<!--
  Thanks for contributing to Data ISC!
  Please fill out the sections below. PRs that leave these blank may be slower to review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Link any related issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 🌍 New / updated scenario or sample dataset
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / internal change
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Describe how you verified the change: dataset uploaded, scenario run, browser(s) checked, `node server.js` smoke test, etc. -->

## Screenshots / clips

<!-- For any UI change, drop a before/after image or short clip here. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My change follows the style of the surrounding code.
- [ ] I have tested the change locally (`node server.js` and in the browser).
- [ ] I have updated documentation where relevant (README, `public/model/`, etc.).
- [ ] No model parameters, growth rates, or scenario coefficients are exposed to the client (see [Architecture](https://github.com/dataisc/data-isc#architecture)).
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Contributor Licence Agreement](../CLA.md).
